data.title: Traeger Announces Reporting Date for First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Traeger, Inc. announced that it will reveal its Q1 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 11, 2026. A conference call will be held at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day for discussing these results. To participate, dial (833) 461-5787 or +1 (585) 542-9983 for international participants. Traeger, the leading wood pellet grill manufacturer, is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol COOK.

data.title: SolarEdge to Announce Financial Results for the First Quarter Ended March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
data.description: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc., a top player in smart energy technology, is set to reveal its financial outcomes for the initial quarter finishing on March 31, 2026, prior to the market opening on May 6, 2026. A conference call chaired by the management is scheduled for May 6, 2026, at 8:00 A.M. Eastern Time to analyze these results. To participate in the live call, dial: US/Canada Toll-Free: +1 800-225-9448 or International Toll: +1 203-518-9.

data.title: REPAY Provides Preliminary First Quarter 2026 Results and Raising Full Year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA Outlook
data.description: Repay Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: RPAY) announced its preliminary, unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026, along with an increase in its full-year 2026 Adjusted EBITDA forecast. The company, a top provider of integrated payment solutions, expects revenue for the quarter ending March 31, 2026 to range between $80.5 million and $81.0 million, marking a growth of around 4%. This update was shared from Atlanta and signifies positive performance trends for Repay Holdings Corporation.

data.title: Riskified Study Finds Consumers Aren’t Ready to Hand Over Control as AI Transforms Shopping, with Over Half Afraid of Online Fraud
data.description: In a recent survey by Riskified, titled "Agentic Commerce Pulse," it was revealed that consumers are increasingly utilizing artificial intelligence (AI) for their shopping needs. However, concerns persist as there is a trust gap when it comes to relinquishing control to AI systems. The survey sheds light on the growing reliance on AI in the shopping experience and highlights the need to bridge the trust deficit.
Russia has added to its stop-list EU representatives who participated in decisions on aid to Ukraine, as well as those who hold views hostile to Moscow, the Foreign Ministry reported.

data.title: Mosaic Platforms delivers a MERIT Driven Market in US Equities
data.description: In New York, today, Mosaic ATS has unveiled a new trading model focusing on fostering trading harmony between counterparties through the concept of MERIT. Recent years have seen significant changes in global markets, with shifts in participant makeup and transaction infrastructure. These changes have greatly impacted how counterparties interact with each other. This has led to a situation where investors and risk providers are often in opposing positions during trades.

data.title: JONATHAN CAHN RETURNS WITH HIS MOST EXPLOSIVE REVELATION YET
data.description: Charisma Media has revealed the upcoming release of a new book titled "The Altar of Secrets," which delves into the ancient mystery behind the ascent and decline of modern empires. The book, published under the Frontline imprint, is set to be launched in Lake Mary, Florida on April 27, 2026. This insightful publication aims to explore the hidden forces shaping the trajectory of global powers, offering valuable insights into what this reveals about the future of the world.

data.title: Oncolytics Aligns with FDA on Planned Pivotal Anal Cancer Study
data.description: Oncolytics Biotech has disclosed a Type C meeting agreement with the FDA regarding the development of a clinical trial to facilitate the approval process for pelareorep in individuals diagnosed with SCAC.
Russia has banned the entry of European officials and representatives of EU countries who assist Kyiv, the Ministry of Foreign Affairs reported.

data.title: HomeLight Launches AI Agent to Automate Real Estate Closings, Secures $40M In Financing to Scale Platform Nationwide
data.description: A new AI escrow agent named EVA has been introduced by HomeLight in Scottsdale, Arizona, to streamline real estate closings. Moreover, the company has successfully raised $40 million from BlackRock to expand its services nationwide.
FDA APPROVES CAPLYTA® (LUMATEPERONE) SNDA WITH ROBUST NEW DATA SUPPORTING REDUCED RISK OF RELAPSE IN SCHIZOPHRENIA

data.title: USA TODAY Again Names Zurn Elkay Water Solutions One of America’s Climate Leaders 2026
data.description: Based in Milwaukee, Zurn Elkay Water Solutions Corporation (NYSE: ZWS) has been recognized as one of America’s Climate Leaders 2026 for the second year in a row by USA Today and Statista. The designation celebrates U.S. companies that made the most significant reductions in their greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions intensity between 2022 and 2024, based on GHG emissions relative to revenue. Statista's analysis shows that Zurn Elkay achieved an impressive 21.3% decrease in greenhouse gas intensity.

Iran reports: 'The Minister of Education announced the martyrdom of 346 cultural figures and students, damage to more than 1,200 educational spaces, and the complete destruction of 20 educational units. He said: 775 damaged schools have been rebuilt and returned to the education cycle so far.'

data.title: AbbVie Submits Regulatory Application to FDA for SKYRIZI® (risankizumab-rzaa) Subcutaneous Induction for Adults with Moderately to Severely Active Crohn's Disease
data.description: New data from the Phase 3 pivotal AFFIRM study backs submission for approval of an additional treatment option for adult Crohn's disease patients. The treatment involves the use of risankizumab-rzaa for intravenous (IV) induction, which is already approved for this purpose. If officially approved, this option will provide these patients with an alternative method for treatment. The submission was made in North Chicago, Illinois on April 27, 2026.
Egypt presidency: 'President Abdel Fattah El-Sisi receives the Deputy Chairman of the Russian Federation and Chairman of the Russian Maritime Board'

data.title: Business First Bancshares, Inc., Announces Financial Results for Q1 2026
data.description: In Baton Rouge, Louisiana on April 27, 2026, Business First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: BFST) disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter that concluded on March 31, 2026. The parent company of b1BANK reported a net income available to common shareholders of $22.2 million, equivalent to $0.68 per diluted common share. This marked an increase of $1.2 million in net income and a decrease of $0.03 per share in comparison to the previous quarter. Excluding certain income and expenses, the core net income for the same period was $24.0 million, translating to $0.73 per diluted common share. This represented an increase of $0.5 million in core net income and a decrease of $0.06 per share from the linked quarter. The financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, encompassed the finalization of the Progressive Bancorp, Inc. acquisition.

data.title: Senior Helpers New Kensington/AK Valley and Greensburg Achieve Prestigious CHAP Age-Friendly Care at Home Certification
data.description: In New Kensington, Pennsylvania on April 27, 2026, Senior Helpers, a leading in-home senior care services provider in the country, has achieved a significant milestone by becoming the first private duty in-home care provider in the United States to receive Age-Friendly Care at Home certification from the Community Health Accreditation Partners (CHAP). This recognition highlights their commitment to providing high-quality care tailored to meet the specific needs of senior citizens.

data.title: FDA grants Priority Review for IMAAVY® (nipocalimab-aahu) as the potential first approved treatment for people living with warm autoimmune hemolytic anemia (wAIHA)
data.description: Medications that show potential for substantial advancements in safety or effectiveness for critical illnesses like warm autoimmune hemolytic anemia, a condition where harmful immunoglobulin G autoantibodies bind to and eliminate red blood cells, are given Priority Review. This condition is life-threatening and affects a significant number of individuals globally.

data.title: TransCode Therapeutics Appoints Dr. Anna Moore as Chair of Scientific Advisory Board; Announces Sponsored Research Agreement with Michigan State University
data.description: The clinical-stage company TransCode Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAZ) based in Boston revealed the appointment of Anna Moore, PhD, as the Chair of its Scientific board on April 27, 2026. Specializing in RNA and immuno-oncology therapeutics for treating high-risk and advanced cancers, the company focuses on advancing innovative treatment options.
